calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2018 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-19-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark Bauman, Esq. 480-502-4664 of Bauman Loewe Witt & Maxwell P.L.L.C. for Plaintiff through Court Call.
A. Foster Shi, Esq. 415-400-0892 of Manning & Kass Ellrod Ramirez Trester LLP for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. Plaintiff argues plastic bins, storage and collection. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT RECOLOGY SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Defendant Recology San Francisco's demurrer to the second and third causes of action for negligence and strict liability in the second amended complaint filed by plaintiff Sentinel Insurance Company is sustained without leave to amend as to both causes of action. Once again Sentinel has failed to allege ultimate facts showing that Recology owed a duty of care to support a negligence claim and that the garbage receptacles were defective to support a strict liability claim. Because Sentinel was given an opportunity to allege a valid claim against Recology and did not do so and there is no indication that it can do so, leave to amend is denied.

Plaintiff is welcome to come back with a motion once more evidence is gathered. Recology is dismissed from the case. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR# 7489, mgheno@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/HK)

*There is an order to consolidate filed on 12/14/17 for all purposes; lead case is CGC-17-558782*

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2017 Continued To Jan-24-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-04-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT RECOLOGY SAN FRANCISCO MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is off calendar in light of the ruling on Recology's demurrer.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Not reported. (L&M302)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-04-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT RECOLOGY SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, as to the second and third causes of action for negligence and strict liability in the first amended complaint filed by plaintiff Sentinel Insurance Company, Ltd. is SUSTAINED with twenty days leave to amend as to both causes of action. Sentinel must allege ultimate facts, not just legal conclusions, which show that Recology owed a duty of care to support a negligence claim and that the garbage receptacles were defective to support a strict liability claim. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Not reported. (L&M302)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-22-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Off calendar at the request of the moving party.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Not reported. (D302)
